daily_brief.key_insight: Risk-off regime with 46% breadth and median momentum -0.7%. Raise cash, honour stops, resist bottom-fishing until breadth recovers above 55%. Macro flow is mildly negative with 155 policy/global items in focus — factor this into position sizing. Sector dispersion is wide: Consumer Disc. leads at 41 while Retail lags at 0 — a stock-picker's tape.
narrative: Regime: BEAR · breadth 46% · median momentum -0.7% · ATR 2.1%
Macro tone: MILDLY NEGATIVE from 155 items across 11 sources

conviction_board.name: Eicher Motors
conviction_board.narrative: One thing to watch: momentum is diverging from the trend. The structure is fine but the engine is losing steam. Moving averages are bullish. Not pristine, but the kind of structure where you buy dips rather than sell rallies. Momentum is flat — RSI at 63 sits in no-man's land. The stock is waiting for a trigger. Volume is thin (0.1x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. Market headwinds are real — 46% breadth in a bearish regime means even good setups get sold. Automobiles is lagging the broader tape (score 29) — an extra headwind. Bull case: sustains above ₹7,597 and pushes towards ₹7,957 as trend followers pile in. Bear case: a slip below ₹7,237 triggers trailing stops and dents the short-term thesis. Range-bound between ₹7,369 and ₹7,779. Patience over conviction. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
